title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
